channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Willow tree in hedge has split and is leaning on an oak beside it, and is overhanging the lane., 5th March
item.description:
Sandy Pluck Lane, in the verge opposite The Daffodils which is the first house down the lane. This willow has been split fir several months and is at risk of falling across the highway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Pluck Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dangerous potholes on Warden Hill Road near junction with Bournside Close, 5th March
item.description:
Multiple dangerous potholes on Warden Hill Road near junction with Bournside Close Nearby resident states that these potholes cause his house to shudder when large/heavy vehicles hit them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Bournside Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 5th March
item.description:
Three items fly tipped on Cassin Drive - I don't know the house number but its opposite the access road for the community centre and police station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3a-3h, Cassin Drive, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped, 5th March
item.description:
There is a pile of furniture fly tipped by the wall on CBC land

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Benhall, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in pothole in pothole, 5th March
item.description:
The pothole that was fixed now has a pothole that was fixed now has another pothole - there is a section about 30metres long that is basically waiting to become a pothole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Shakespeare Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, more than one, on the hill outside the house on stilts, 5th March
item.description:
Huge pothole, more than one, on the hill outside the house on stilts on right hand side as you go half up the hill, seems lots of reports already identifying this huge pothole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 5th March
item.description:
I have a large council owned tree adjacent to the front of my property which has grown significantly over my garden and driveway. As the tree has aged there seems to be more dead branches and other debris from it landing in my garden and there are also two large branches overhanging my property which seem to have large holes in them and may be rotten and therefore unsafe. I shall be grateful if you would arrange to inspect the tree and prune any dangerous or overgrown branches please.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 5th March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR JOB 43118267: Pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th March
item.description:
28 day with Standard TM CW pothole approx 600x400x45mm perm repair STATS (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 5th March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR JOB 43118254: Pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 litre milk carton for perspective, 5th March
item.description:
Just past the railway bridge in Gretton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole in middle of junction, 5th March
item.description:
Junction of Cook Lane and Wainlode Lane, Norton. Has been there a while.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen hedge blocking view, 5th March
item.description:
Fallen hedging needs cutting back, blocks the view of oncoming cars from junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to curb at 14 Greenhills Road inadequate patch has shrunk away from original tarmac to leave crater. Large thump when car goes over it. Next rainfall will make it extremely dangerous., 5th March
item.description:
Near curb at entrance to 14 Greenhills Road. Further hole in middle of road ( between 6 & 14.- see pic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 5th March
item.description:
Reg no: KN58 JYV left on main road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Orchard Way, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two connected potholes in the uphill entrance to Green St, 5th March
item.description:
Potholes opening up at the uphill entrance to Green Street (Coopers Hill) from the A46. They are just off the main A46 between houses named Anchordyne and Talarna at the crossroads of Green St with the A46. These holes have been repaired before and are opening up again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 36 inch pothole on left of road after roundabout, 5th March
item.description:
Wide and long pothole on left of road after roundabout, heading towards stoke orchard. Has been there a while.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking restrictions No parking 8am - 6.30pm Mon - Sat, 4th March
item.description:
Car & van obstructing pathway everyday between restricted parking hours house numbers 29 - 27 unable to walk along the path due to these vehicles, which causes an issue for elderly residents that live in Foxwell Drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxwell Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance to Tesco, 4th March
item.description:
Carpark entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 229, Hewlett Road, Battledown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole almost as deep as a tennis ball, 4th March
item.description:
The photo shows the pot hole adjacent to the sign to The Uplands. This was reported under 8703911 then reported again under 8904482. I have received an email to say this has been fixed but this is erroneous as no repair has been made. Since the original report the pot hole has continued to deteriorate and is now almost the depth of a tennis ball.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
